tagline: Enhancements across supported Databricks Runtime versions.
what_it_does: The latest maintenance updates for Databricks Runtime versions include critical bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements. These updates ensure that users benefit from the latest enhancements and maintain a secure and efficient environment. Supported versions include Databricks Runtime 18, 18.2, 18.1, 18.0, and several LTS versions.
why_it_matters: Regular maintenance updates are essential for maintaining system security, improving performance, and ensuring reliability. By applying these updates, organizations can mitigate risks associated with vulnerabilities and enhance the overall user experience, leading to increased productivity and trust in the platform.
plain_summary: The latest maintenance updates for Databricks Runtime versions include critical bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements. These updates ensure that users benefit from the latest enhancements and maintain a secure and efficient environment.

capabilities.title: Bug Fixes
capabilities.desc: Addresses known issues to improve stability and user experience.

capabilities.title: Security Patches
capabilities.desc: Implements fixes for vulnerabilities to enhance system security.

capabilities.title: Performance Improvements
capabilities.desc: Optimizes runtime performance for better resource utilization.

capabilities.title: Support for Multiple Versions
capabilities.desc: Updates are available for various Databricks Runtime versions, including LTS.

steps.title: Review Release Notes
steps.desc: Check the specific updates for each Databricks Runtime version.

steps.title: Plan Update Schedule
steps.desc: Determine the best time to apply updates to minimize disruption.

steps.title: Backup Data
steps.desc: Ensure that all critical data is backed up before applying updates.

steps.title: Apply Updates
steps.desc: Follow the procedures to implement the maintenance updates.

steps.title: Monitor Performance
steps.desc: After updates, monitor system performance and stability.

key_takeaway: Regular maintenance updates enhance security, performance, and reliability across Databricks Runtime versions.
